name: District of Columbia Respiratory Therapist License
description: Already licensed as a respiratory therapist? Here's whether your license transfers to District of Columbia - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: DC Board of Respiratory Care
provider.parentOrganization: DC Department of Health, Health Regulation and Licensing Administration (HRLA)

address.description:
DC Department of Health
Health Regulation and Licensing Administration
Board of Respiratory Care
899 North Capitol Street NE, 3rd Floor
Washington, DC 20002

requiredDocuments.name: Official Transcripts
requiredDocuments.description: Sent directly from your educational institution.

requiredDocuments.name: Exam Score Report
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing the NBRC (National Board for Respiratory Care) TMC Exam.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does a District of Columbia respiratory therapist license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around $100 to $200. Check the specific fee breakdown above.
Yes, passing the NBRC (National Board for Respiratory Care) TMC Exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

mainEntity.name: Does District of Columbia have reciprocity for respiratory therapists?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers respiratory therapist practice in District of Columbia. To work in District of Columbia, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my respiratory therapist license to District of Columbia?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in District of Columbia while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
